steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The notes include one detail that stands out: the Great Plains Dinosaur Museum in Malta, Montana houses a fossil nicknamed Roberta. The question asks for the choice that best uses this specific example (the nickname).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Dinosaur fossil specimens can be found at museums all over the world, and many of these specimens are given nicknames.': speaks only in generalities; uses neither the specific museum nor the nickname Roberta. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Nicknames are given to many dinosaur fossil specimens, including one housed at a museum in Malta, Montana.': mentions the location but omits the nickname Roberta, leaving the specific example incomplete. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Roberta is the nickname of a Brachylophosaurus fossil specimen housed at the Great Plains Dinosaur Museum and Field Station in Malta, Montana.': names Roberta, the species, and the specific museum — the most complete use of the key detail. ✓
  • Choice D — 'A Brachylophosaurus fossil specimen from the Late Cretaceous period, which ended more than 65 million years ago, is housed at the Great Plains Dinosaur Museum and Field Station.': mentions the museum but omits the nickname entirely. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
